module_sme_rollup.name: Core Accounting & Ledger
module_sme_rollup.description: Chart of accounts, journal entries, period close, and audit-ready financial records.

statements.text: Configure chart of accounts with account types and dimension codes; post balanced journal entries with supporting documentation.
Migrate opening balances and reconcile sub-ledgers to general ledger; drill down from trial balance to source transactions.
statements.rationale: Ensures data integrity and audit trail

statements.text: Control period and year-end close with posting locks, retained earnings rollover, and task tracking with completion status.
statements.rationale: Prevents unauthorized changes to closed periods

statements.text: Create recurring and reversing journal entry templates for routine adjustments and accruals.
Record immutable audit trail of all transactions with user, timestamp, and action details for compliance.

module_sme_rollup.name: Receivables, Payables & Cash
module_sme_rollup.description: Customer invoicing, vendor payments, bank reconciliation, and payment processing.

statements.text: Maintain customer and vendor master data with billing address, tax ID, payment terms, and bank accounts.
statements.rationale: Enables accurate invoicing and payment routing

statements.text: Create and auto-generate invoices from sales orders with tax calculations, discounts, and electronic delivery via email.
statements.rationale: Accelerates billing cycle and reduces manual entry

statements.text: Apply customer payments to single or multiple invoices flexibly; process credit notes and refunds against invoices.
Capture vendor bills via manual entry or automated document digitization; perform three-way matching with PO and receipt.
Route bills through multi-level approval workflows with configurable monetary thresholds and schedule payment runs.
statements.rationale: Enforces authorization controls and cash planning

statements.text: Automatically match bank transactions to ledger records; import bank statements in OFX, CSV, MT940, and CAMT.053 formats.
Support multiple bank accounts in any currency with balance reporting and manual reconciliation of unmatched items.
Generate customer and vendor ageing reports with DSO, DPO, and payment tracking by age bucket.

module_sme_rollup.name: Tax, Compliance & Reporting
module_sme_rollup.description: Tax calculation, statutory filing, financial statements, and regulatory compliance.

statements.text: Configure tax codes with rates, types, and reporting groups; automatically calculate tax on sales and purchase transactions.
Track input and output tax separately; support tax-inclusive and tax-exclusive pricing with partial exemption and reverse-charge rules.
Generate periodic tax returns in required format and submit to revenue authority via API integration.
statements.rationale: Automates tax filing and reduces manual effort

statements.text: Generate profit and loss, balance sheet, trial balance, and cash flow statements with comparative and budget-versus-actual analysis.
Enable drill-down from financial statement lines to underlying general ledger transactions and supporting detail.
Map general ledger accounts to ACRA XBRL taxonomy; validate and submit XBRL documents with directors' report and notes.
Generate audit evidence export bundle containing transactions, approvals, and control execution logs for external auditors.

module_sme_rollup.name: Assets, Budgets & Forecasting
module_sme_rollup.description: Fixed assets, depreciation, budgeting, and financial forecasting.

statements.text: Maintain fixed-asset register with category, location, custodian, acquisition date, cost, and useful life.
Support straight-line, declining-balance, and units-of-production depreciation; automatically post entries to general ledger.
Process asset disposals and automatically calculate gain or loss on sale; transfer assets between locations with audit trail.
Create and maintain annual operating budgets by account, department, cost center, and project with approval workflows.
Display actual versus budget variance on all financial reports; support multiple budget versions and rolling forecasts.
Track purchase order commitments and encumbrances against budget allocations; enforce budget approval workflows.

module_sme_rollup.name: Multi-Currency, Projects & Treasury
module_sme_rollup.description: Foreign exchange, project accounting, expense management, and cash forecasting.

statements.text: Record transactions in any currency with automatic conversion to functional currency; maintain live exchange rate table.
Revalue open receivables, payables, and bank balances at period end; calculate and post realized and unrealized FX gains and losses.
Capture multi-line expense reports with project codes and cost centres; route through approval workflows and post to general ledger.
Integrate corporate card feeds and automatically match transactions to claims; process reimbursement via payroll or direct payment.
Maintain project master data with budget and dates; track project expenses and calculate work-in-progress balances.
Generate rolling 13-week and 12-month cashflow forecasts from receivables ageing, payables, and payroll schedules.
Consolidate cash balances across multiple bank accounts and legal entities; model stress, base, and upside scenarios.

Extract invoice and receipt data using OCR and machine learning; automatically populate extracted data into the system.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your finance system is accessible, secure, and connected to the rest of your business. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA data protection rules and need staff to access financial data safely from anywhere—especially in hybrid work environments. It matters when your accountant needs to approve an invoice from a client site, or when you're integrating bank feeds to reconcile cash daily.

Core Ledger & Close.narrative: This is the financial backbone—it records every transaction in double-entry format, generates your statutory accounts, and tracks fixed assets and depreciation. Every Singapore SME must produce audited or reviewed financial statements for tax and stakeholder reporting, and you need an immutable audit trail to satisfy ACRA and your auditors. It matters when you're closing the books monthly or preparing for year-end audit.

Revenue Cycle.narrative: This family handles customer invoicing, payment collection, and credit risk—the lifeblood of cash flow. Singapore SMEs need to issue invoices quickly, track who owes money, and integrate with local payment schemes (PayNow, GIRO) to get paid faster. It matters when a customer disputes an invoice or when you need to chase overdue payments to keep cash flowing.

Expense Cycle.narrative: This family captures supplier bills, employee expenses, and purchase orders, then routes them for approval and payment. SMEs need to control spending, match invoices to orders, and integrate payroll costs into the ledger. It matters when you're managing multiple vendors, reimbursing staff for travel, or tracking project costs for client billing.

Treasury & Compliance.narrative: This family manages cash, tax, multi-currency transactions, and regulatory filings—critical for compliance and liquidity. Singapore SMEs must file GST returns, reconcile bank accounts, and file XBRL statements with ACRA; many also operate in multiple currencies. It matters when you're forecasting cash to avoid overdrafts, calculating GST on every sale, or preparing quarterly tax filings.

Planning & Analytics.narrative: This family lets you budget, forecast, and visualize financial performance through dashboards and reports. SMEs use budgets to control spending and forecasts to plan growth; dashboards help management spot trends and make faster decisions. It matters when you're planning next year's headcount, comparing actual sales to forecast, or explaining cash burn to investors.
